title: Check & Checkmate
summary: Understand the goal of every game

steps.title: The Goal
steps.text: You win chess by checkmating the opposing king — attacking him in a way he cannot escape. Here your queen and king are closing in. Let's finish it.

steps.hint: Hit the 8th rank — the king has no escape.

steps.title: Different Angle
steps.text: Same idea, different position. The back rank is ripe.

steps.hint: Cut off the 8th rank from the side. Qa8#.

steps.title: Back-Rank Mate
steps.text: When a king is trapped behind his own pawns on the back rank, a rook or queen on that rank can deliver mate. This is one of the most common patterns in chess.

steps.hint: The king's pawns are his wall — but also his prison.
